bead.title: Document bd/doltdb fallback backend wiring
bead.description: Single docs artifact (e.g. docs/bead-backends.md or under docs/helix/) describing how to wire bd as the bead-tracker backend if axon adoption stalls. Cover: the Backend interface contract, where a bd-backed implementation would live, JSONL interchange, and known tradeoffs (external dependency).
bead.acceptance: 1. One doc file lands under docs/ describing the bd fallback path. 2. Doc references the Backend interface from ddx-bbdd7564 and the axon backend from ddx-95ec5ed5 for contrast. 3. Doc lists explicit wiring steps a future implementer would follow.
